{
  "contents": "<?php\n/**\n * 成员管理 API\n */\n\nrequire_once '../config.php';\nrequire_once '../bot/TelegramBot.php';\ncheckLogin();\n\n$db = getDB();\n$bot = new TelegramBot(BOT_TOKEN);\n\n// GET 请求\nif ($_SERVER['REQUEST_METHOD'] == 'GET') {\n    $action = $_GET['action'] ?? 'list';\n    $group_id = $_GET['group_id'] ?? 0;\n    \n    if ($action == 'list') {\n        try {\n            $query = \"SELECT gm.*, g.title as group_title FROM group_members gm JOIN groups g ON gm.group_id = g.id\";\n            \n            if ($group_id) {\n                $stmt = $db->prepare($query . \" WHERE gm.group_id = ? ORDER BY gm.id DESC\");\n                $stmt->execute([$group_id]);\n            } else {\n                $stmt = $db->query($query . \" ORDER BY gm.id DESC\");\n            }\n            \n            $members = $stmt->fetchAll();\n            jsonResponse(['success' => true, 'data' => $members]);\n        } catch (Exception $e) {\n            logSystem('error', 'Fetch members error', $e->getMessage());\n            jsonResponse(['success' => false, 'message' => '获取失败'], 500);\n        }\n    }\n}\n\n// POST 请求\nif ($_SERVER['REQUEST_METHOD'] == 'POST') {\n    $data = json_decode(file_get_contents('php://input'), true);\n    $action = $data['action'] ?? '';\n    \n    switch ($action) {\n        case 'kick':\n            $member_id = $data['member_id'] ?? 0;\n            \n            if (!$member_id) {\n                jsonResponse(['success' => false, 'message' => '无效的ID'], 400);\n            }\n            \n            try {\n                $stmt = $db->prepare(\"SELECT gm.user_id, g.chat_id FROM group_members gm JOIN groups g ON gm.group_id = g.id WHERE gm.id = ?\");\n                $stmt->execute([$member_id]);\n                $member = $stmt->fetch();\n                \n                if (!$member) {\n                    jsonResponse(['success' => false, 'message' => '成员不存在'], 404);\n                }\n                \n                $bot->kickChatMember($member['chat_id'], $member['user_id']);\n                \n                $stmt = $db->prepare(\"UPDATE group_members SET status = 'kicked' WHERE id = ?\");\n                $stmt->execute([$member_id]);\n                \n                logSystem('info', 'Kicked member', ['member_id' => $member_id]);\n                jsonResponse(['success' => true, 'message' => '已踢出成员']);\n            } catch (Exception $e) {\n                logSystem('error', 'Kick member error', $e->getMessage());\n                jsonResponse(['success' => false, 'message' => '操作失败'], 500);\n            }\n            break;\n            \n        case 'ban':\n            $member_id = $data['member_id'] ?? 0;\n            \n            if (!$member_id) {\n                jsonResponse(['success' => false, 'message' => '无效的ID'], 400);\n            }\n            \n            try {\n                $stmt = $db->prepare(\"SELECT gm.user_id, g.chat_id, g.id as group_id FROM group_members gm JOIN groups g ON gm.group_id = g.id WHERE gm.id = ?\");\n                $stmt->execute([$member_id]);\n                $member = $stmt->fetch();\n                \n                if (!$member) {\n                    jsonResponse(['success' => false, 'message' => '成员不存在'], 404);\n                }\n                \n                $bot->kickChatMember($member['chat_id'], $member['user_id'], 0);\n                \n                // 添加到黑名单\n                $stmt = $db->prepare(\"INSERT INTO blacklist (user_id, group_id, reason, banned_by) VALUES (?, ?, '后台封禁', ?)\");\n                $stmt->execute([$member['user_id'], $member['group_id'], $_SESSION['admin_id']]);\n                \n                logSystem('info', 'Banned member', ['member_id' => $member_id]);\n                jsonResponse(['success' => true, 'message' => '已封禁成员']);\n            } catch (Exception $e) {\n                logSystem('error', 'Ban member error', $e->getMessage());\n                jsonResponse(['success' => false, 'message' => '操作失败'], 500);\n            }\n            break;\n            \n        case 'mute':\n            $member_id = $data['member_id'] ?? 0;\n            $duration = $data['duration'] ?? 3600; // 默认1小时\n            \n            if (!$member_id) {\n                jsonResponse(['success' => false, 'message' => '无效的ID'], 400);\n            }\n            \n            try {\n                $stmt = $db->prepare(\"SELECT gm.user_id, g.chat_id FROM group_members gm JOIN groups g ON gm.group_id = g.id WHERE gm.id = ?\");\n                $stmt->execute([$member_id]);\n                $member = $stmt->fetch();\n                \n                if (!$member) {\n                    jsonResponse(['success' => false, 'message' => '成员不存在'], 404);\n                }\n                \n                $bot->restrictChatMember($member['chat_id'], $member['user_id'], time() + $duration);\n                \n                logSystem('info', 'Muted member', ['member_id' => $member_id, 'duration' => $duration]);\n                jsonResponse(['success' => true, 'message' => '已禁言成员']);\n            } catch (Exception $e) {\n                logSystem('error', 'Mute member error', $e->getMessage());\n                jsonResponse(['success' => false, 'message' => '操作失败'], 500);\n            }\n            break;\n            \n        default:\n            jsonResponse(['success' => false, 'message' => '无效的操作'], 400);\n    }\n}\n\n",
  "totalLinesInFile": 135
}

'/../vendor/autoload.php';\n}\n\nuse danog\\MadelineProto\\API;\nuse danog\\MadelineProto\\Settings;\nuse danog\\MadelineProto\\Logger;\n\n$db = getDB();\n\n// 自定义日志函数\nfunction syncLog($message) {\n    error_log(\"[Sync User Groups] \" . $message);\n}\n\nheader('Content-Type: application/json; charset=utf-8');\n\nif ($_SERVER['REQUEST_METHOD'] !== 'POST') {\n    jsonResponse(['success' => false, 'message' => '无效的请求方法'], 400);\n}\n\ntry {\n    syncLog(\"开始同步真人账号群组列表\");\n    \n    // 获取用户账号配置\n    $stmt = $db->prepare(\"SELECT * FROM user_account_config WHERE id = 1 AND is_logged_in = 1\");\n    $stmt->execute();\n    $config = $stmt->fetch();\n    \n    if (!$config || empty($config['session_data'])) {\n        syncLog(\"真人账号未登录\");\n        jsonResponse(['success' => false, 'message' => '真人账号未登录，请先登录'], 400);\n    }\n    \n    $session_file = $config['session_data'];\n    \n    if (!file_exists($session_file)) {\n        syncLog(\"Session文件不存在: $session_file\");\n        jsonResponse(['success' => false, 'message' => 'Session文件不存在'], 500);\n    }\n    \n    syncLog(\"加载 MadelineProto\");\n    \n    // 创建设置\n    $settings = new Settings;\n    $settings->getLogger()->setType(Logger::FILE_LOGGER);\n    $settings->getLogger()->setExtra(dirname($session_file) . '/madeline.log');\n    $settings->getLogger()->setLevel(Logger::ERROR);\n    \n    // 配置 API 凭证\n    $api_id = defined('TELEGRAM_API_ID') ? TELEGRAM_API_ID : 10488249;\n    $api_hash = defined('TELEGRAM_API_HASH') ? TELEGRAM_API_HASH : '7abacb2417fb58895b85ed2647e67e2d';\n    $settings->getAppInfo()->setApiId($api_id);\n    $settings->getAppInfo()->setApiHash($api_hash);\n    \n    // 加载 MadelineProto 实例\n    $MadelineProto = new API($session_file, $settings);\n    \n    syncLog(\"获取对话列表\");\n    \n    // 获取所有对话\n    $dialogs = $MadelineProto->messages->getDialogs([\n        'limit' => 100 // 获取最近100个对话\n    ]);\n    \n    syncLog(\"收到 \" . count($dialogs['dialogs']) . \" 个对话\");\n    \n    $syncedCount = 0;\n    $skippedCount = 0;\n    $updatedCount = 0;\n    \n    // 遍历所有对话\n    foreach ($dialogs['dialogs'] as $dialog) {\n        $peer = $dialog['peer'];\n        \n        // 只处理频道和超级群组\n        if (isset($peer['channel_id'])) {\n            $channel_id = $peer['channel_id'];\n            \n            // 从 chats 中获取群组信息\n            $chat = null;\n            foreach ($dialogs['chats'] as $c) {\n                if (isset($c['id']) && $c['id'] == $channel_id) {\n                    $chat = $c;\n                    break;\n                }\n            }\n            \n            if (!$chat) {\n                syncLog(\"找不到频道 $channel_id 的详细信息\");\n                continue;\n            }\n            \n            // 跳过普通频道（只要超级群组）\n            if (!isset($chat['megagroup']) || !$chat['megagroup']) {\n                syncLog(\"跳过普通频道: \" . ($chat['title'] ?? 'Unknown'));\n                $skippedCount++;\n                continue;\n            }\n            \n            // 构建 chat_id（超级群组的格式是 -100 + channel_id）\n            $chat_id = -1000000000000 - $channel_id;\n            $title = $chat['title'] ?? 'Unknown Group';\n            \n            syncLog(\"发现超级群组: $title (chat_id: $chat_id)\");\n            \n            // 检查群组是否已存在\n            $stmt = $db->prepare(\"SELECT id, source FROM groups WHERE chat_id = ?\");\n            $stmt->execute([$chat_id]);\n            $existingGroup = $stmt->fetch();\n            \n            if ($existingGroup) {\n                // 群组已存在，更新来源标识\n                $currentSource = $existingGroup['source'];\n                $newSource = $currentSource;\n                \n                if ($currentSource === 'bot') {\n                    $newSource = 'both'; // 机器人和真人账号都在\n                } elseif ($currentSource === 'user_account') {\n                    $newSource = 'user_account'; // 保持不变\n                } elseif ($currentSource === 'both') {\n                    $newSource = 'both'; // 保持不变\n                }\n                \n                // 更新群组信息\n                $updateStmt = $db->prepare(\"UPDATE groups SET title = ?, source = ?, is_active = 1, is_deleted = 0 WHERE chat_id = ?\");\n                $updateStmt->execute([$title, $newSource, $chat_id]);\n                \n                syncLog(\"更新群组: $title (source: $currentSource -> $newSource)\");\n                $updatedCount++;\n            } else {\n                // 新群组，插入数据库\n                $insertStmt = $db->prepare(\"INSERT INTO groups (chat_id, title, source, is_active, is_deleted) VALUES (?, ?, 'user_account', 1, 0)\");\n                $insertStmt->execute([$chat_id, $title]);\n                \n                syncLog(\"新增群组: $title (source: user_account)\");\n                $syncedCount++;\n            }\n        }\n    }\n    \n    syncLog(\"同步完成！新增: $syncedCount, 更新: $updatedCount, 跳过: $skippedCount\");\n    \n    jsonResponse([\n        'success' => true, \n        'message' => \"同步完成！新增 $syncedCount 个群组，更新 $updatedCount 个群组\",\n        'data' => [\n            'synced' => $syncedCount,\n            'updated' => $updatedCount,\n            'skipped' => $skippedCount\n        ]\n    ]);\n    \n} catch (Exception $e) {\n    syncLog(\"同步失败: \" . $e->getMessage());\n    syncLog(\"Stack trace: \" . $e->getTraceAsString());\n    jsonResponse(['success' => false, 'message' => '同步失败: ' . $e->getMessage()], 500);\n}\n\n",
  "totalLinesInFile": 169
}

  "contents": "function saveMember($db, $chat_id, $user, $inviter = null) {\n    try {\n        // 记录开始保存成员\n        logSystem('info', '正在保存成员信息', [\n            'chat_id' => $chat_id,\n            'user_id' => $user['id'],\n            'username' => $user['username'] ?? null,\n            'first_name' => $user['first_name'] ?? null\n        ]);\n\n        // 确保 group_members 表有邀请者字段（首次自动迁移）\n        static $inviterColumnsChecked = false;\n        if (!$inviterColumnsChecked) {\n            $inviterColumnsChecked = true;\n            try {\n                $chk = $db->query(\"SHOW COLUMNS FROM group_members LIKE 'invited_by_user_id'\");\n                if ($chk->rowCount() == 0) {\n                    $db->exec(\"ALTER TABLE group_members ADD COLUMN invited_by_user_id BIGINT DEFAULT NULL AFTER status\");\n                    $db->exec(\"ALTER TABLE group_members ADD COLUMN invited_by_username VARCHAR(255) DEFAULT NULL AFTER invited_by_user_id\");\n                    error_log(\"Added invited_by columns to group_members\");\n                }\n            } catch (Exception $e) {\n                error_log(\"saveMember column check error: \" . $e->getMessage());\n            }\n        }\n\n        // 获取群组ID\n        $stmt = $db->prepare(\"SELECT id, title FROM groups WHERE chat_id = ?\");\n        $stmt->execute([$chat_id]);\n        $group = $stmt->fetch();\n        \n        if (!$group) {\n            throw new Exception('找不到对应的群组记录');\n        }\n\n        // 检查成员是否已存在\n        $stmt = $db->prepare(\"SELECT * FROM group_members WHERE group_id = ? AND user_id = ?\");\n        $stmt->execute([$group['id'], $user['id']]);\n        $existing = $stmt->fetch();\n\n        $inviter_user_id = isset($inviter['id']) ? (int) $inviter['id'] : null;\n        $inviter_username = $inviter['username'] ?? null;\n\n        // 保存或更新成员信息\n        $stmt = $db->prepare(\"\n            INSERT INTO group_members \n                (group_id, user_id, username, first_name, last_name, is_bot, status, invited_by_user_id, invited_by_username) \n            VALUES \n                (?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, 'member', ?, ?) \n            ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE \n                username = ?, \n                first_name = ?, \n                last_name = ?,\n                status = 'member',\n                invited_by_user_id = COALESCE(VALUES(invited_by_user_id), invited_by_user_id),\n                invited_by_username = COALESCE(VALUES(invited_by_username), invited_by_username),\n                updated_at = NOW()\n        \");\n\n        $stmt->execute([\n            $group['id'],\n            $user['id'],\n            $user['username'] ?? null,\n            $user['first_name'] ?? null,\n            $user['last_name'] ?? null,\n            $user['is_bot'] ?? 0,\n            $inviter_user_id,\n            $inviter_username,\n            $user['username'] ?? null,\n            $user['first_name'] ?? null,\n            $user['last_name'] ?? null,\n        ]);\n\n        // 记录保存结果\n        if ($existing) {\n            logSystem('info', '成员信息更新成功', [\n                'group' => $group['title'],\n                'user_id' => $user['id'],\n                'username' => $user['username'] ?? null,\n                'action' => 'updated'\n            ]);\n        } else {\n            logSystem('info', '新成员添加成功', [\n                'group' => $group['title'],\n                'user_id' => $user['id'],\n                'username' => $user['username'] ?? null,\n                'action' => 'inserted'\n            ]);\n        }\n        \n        error_log(\"Member saved: user_id={$user['id']}, username=\" . ($user['username'] ?? 'NULL') . \", group={$group['title']}\" . ($inviter_user_id ? \", invited_by=$inviter_user_id\" : ''));\n        \n    } catch (Exception $e) {\n        logSystem('error', '保存成员失败: ' . $e->getMessage(), [\n            'chat_id' => $chat_id,\n            'user_id' => $user['id'],\n            'error' => $e->getMessage()\n        ]);\n        error_log(\"saveMember error: \" . $e->getMessage());\n    }",

> Now I have a clear picture of how members enter the database. Let me summarize the findings:
>
> 1. **Members are written to the database via `saveMember()` function** which is triggered in these scenarios:
>    - **Event-driven (passive)**: When Telegram sends webhook updates to the bot
>    - **`chat_member` update**: When someone joins a supergroup (status changes to 'member')
>    - **`message.new_chat_members`**: When new members join (old-style Telegram update)
>    - **Each message sent**: `saveMember()` is called for every message sender (line 490)
>    - **Incidental sync**: When a user is mentioned and not in DB, API lookup saves them
>
> 2. **Why only 400+ out of 2000 members are captured**: The system is entirely passive and reactive—it only captures members when they perform actions like joining or sending messages. The 400 members are those who joined after the bot was added or sent at least one message, while the remaining ~1600 joined before the bot existed or have never interacted in the group. There's no bulk import mechanism to backfill existing members.

## 🤖 Assistant #25 (Agent)

_2026-04-22 08:18:02Z_

现在我有完整的答案了。让我整理一下分析结果：

---

## 成员数据入库方式分析

### 数据写入的核心函数

所有成员入库都通过 `saveMember()` 函数（`webhook.php` 第 770 行）实现，采用 `INSERT ... ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE` 模式，**每次只保存一个用户**。

### 触发入库的时机（全部是被动事件驱动）

| 触发场景 | 代码位置 | 说明 |
|---------|---------|------|
| 有人加入群组（`chat_member` 更新） | 第 205 行 | Telegram 超级群成员变更事件 |
| 有人加入群组（`new_chat_members` 消息） | 第 247/279 行 | 旧式 Telegram 加入消息 |
| **有人在群里发消息** | 第 490 行 | 每条消息都会保存发送者 |
| 被 @ 提及但库里没有时实时查询 | 第 3836/3886 行 | 被动补录 |

### 为什么 2000 人的群只有 400 多人？

**根本原因：系统没有主动批量拉取成员的机制**，完全依赖事件驱动被动入库：

```
只记录了那些在 Bot 存在期间做过操作的成员：
  ✅ Bot 加入后 才入群的用户 → 触发 new_chat_members 事件
  ✅ Bot 加入后 在群内发过消息的用户 → 触发消息事件(第490行)
  ❌ Bot 加入之前就已经在群里 且 之后一直潜水从不发言的用户 → 永远不会被记录
```

400 多人 ≈ Bot 接入后**有活跃行为**的成员，另外 1600 人是 Bot 未接入前的老成员或长期潜水用户。

### 如何补全剩余成员？

如果需要完整同步全部成员，需要调用 Telegram API 的 `getChatAdministrators` 或利用 MadelineProto（真人账号）的 `channels.getParticipants` 接口主动拉取全量成员列表写入数据库。当前的 `api/sync_user_groups.php` 只同步了**群组列表**，并没有同步**群组成员**。

<details>
<summary><strong>💭 Thinking Process</strong></summary>

> Now I have a clear picture of the `group_members` table:
>
> 1. The `id` column is `int(11) NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT` - max value is 2,147,483,647
> 2. The `group_id` is `int(11)`
> 3. The `user_id` is `bigint(20)`
> 4. There's a UNIQUE KEY on `(group_id, user_id)` - this ensures each user can only have one record per group
> 5. The `ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE` in the INSERT handles duplicates by updating the existing record
>
> So there is NO programmatic limit in `saveMember()`. The limits are:
>
>
> - MySQL's `int(11)` AUTO_INCREMENT can theoretically store ~2.1 billion rows, but that's not a practical constraint
> - The UNIQUE constraint on `(group_id, user_id)` prevents duplicates and repeated calls just update the existing record
> - For a realistic group with thousands of members, there's no issue whatsoever
>
> So `saveMember()` has no meaningful upper limit—the only ceiling is MySQL's own AUTO_INCREMENT range, which is practically irrelevant for real-world use cases.

</details>

## `saveMember()` 无上限限制

代码层面和数据库表结构层面都**没有任何人为设置的存储上限**。

### 数据库表结构

```400:411:localhost.sql
CREATE TABLE `group_members` (
  `id` int(11) NOT NULL,
  `group_id` int(11) NOT NULL,
  `user_id` bigint(20) NOT NULL,
  `username` varchar(100) DEFAULT NULL,
  `first_name` varchar(100) DEFAULT NULL,
  `last_name` varchar(100) DEFAULT NULL,
  `status` enum('member','administrator','creator','restricted','left','kicked') DEFAULT 'member',
  `is_bot` tinyint(1) DEFAULT '0',
  `joined_at` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  `updated_at` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4;
```

```1130:1133:localhost.sql
ALTER TABLE `group_members`
  ADD PRIMARY KEY (`id`),
  ADD UNIQUE KEY `group_user` (`group_id`,`user_id`),
  ADD KEY `user_id` (`user_id`);
```

### 关键点说明

| 项目 | 情况 |
|------|------|
| 代码中的限制 | **无**，`saveMember()` 逻辑本身没有数量判断 |
| `id` 字段 `int(11) AUTO_INCREMENT` | 上限约 **21亿条**，实际不可能触达 |
| `UNIQUE KEY (group_id, user_id)` | 只保证同一群组同一用户不重复，不是上限 |
| `ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE` | 重复调用时**更新而非报错**，确保幂等 |

### 真正的入库瓶颈不是"上限"，而是"触发时机"

400 多人的原因在上次分析已明确 —— 被动事件驱动，不是因为有上限。**只要用户在 Bot 存在期间有过入群/发消息行为，`saveMember()` 就会无限制地写入**，不存在任何数量限制。

'/debug.log');\nerror_reporting(E_ALL);\nini_set('display_errors', 0); // 不输出到屏幕，只记录到日志\n\n// 设置错误处理\nset_error_handler(function($errno, $errstr, $errfile, $errline) {\n    error_log(\"PHP Error [$errno]: $errstr in $errfile on line $errline\");\n    return false;\n});\n\nset_exception_handler(function($exception) {\n    error_log(\"PHP Exception: \" . $exception->getMessage());\n    error_log(\"Stack trace: \" . $exception->getTraceAsString());\n});\n\nregister_shutdown_function(function() {\n    $error = error_get_last();\n    if ($error !== null && in_array($error['type'], [E_ERROR, E_PARSE, E_CORE_ERROR, E_COMPILE_ERROR])) {\n        error_log(\"PHP Fatal Error: \" . print_r($error, true));\n    }\n});\n\n// 记录调试信息\nerror_log(\"Webhook debug - Time: \" . date('Y-m-d H:i:s'));\nerror_log(\"Request Method: \" . $_SERVER['REQUEST_METHOD']);\nerror_log(\"Content-Type: \" . ($_SERVER['CONTENT_TYPE'] ?? 'not set'));\nerror_log(\"Content-Length: \" . ($_SERVER['CONTENT_LENGTH'] ?? 'not set'));\n\n// **关键：先读取输入数据，再加载其他文件**\n// 这样即使后续加载失败，我们也能看到请求内容\n$raw_input = @file_get_contents(\"php://input\");\nif ($raw_input !== false && !empty($raw_input)) {\n    @file_put_contents(__DIR__ . 'yes' : 'no'));\n\ntry {\n    error_log(\"[STEP 1] Starting to require config.php\");\n    require_once __DIR__ . '/../config.php';\n    \n    // 重新设置错误日志到 webhook 的 debug.log（因为 config.php 可能改变了它）\n    ini_set('error_log', __DIR__ . > Let me look at more of the webhook.php code to identify potential issues. I need to check the `chat_member` update handling more carefully. 
>
> Key issues I've noticed so far:
>
> 1. **`chat_member` update** (line 181-212): The logic checks `$new_status === 'member'` and `!$was_already_in`. But this misses users who join as `restricted` (e.g., unverified users) - they won't be saved. Only when they go from `restricted` to `member` after verification - but that case is also excluded by `$was_already_in`.
>
>
> 2. **Verification flow problem**: When someone joins fresh, they're added as `restricted`, so `$was_already_in` becomes true. Then when they're verified and promoted to `member`, the condition `!$was_already_in` fails, so `saveMember()` never gets called for the verified state.
>
> 3. **`new_chat_members` bug**: The code calls `saveMember()` before confirming the group exists in the database. If the group lookup at line 232 fails, `saveMember()` will throw an error because there's no matching group record.
>
> Actually, wait—`saveGroup` runs first at line 226, so the group should exist by the time `saveMember()` is called. Let me trace through this more carefully.
>
> If `saveGroup` succeeds, the group should be found at line 232. The `if (!$group)` branch only executes if `saveGroup` failed or the group doesn't exist for some reason. In that case, calling `saveMember()` without a valid group would fail silently with the "找不到对应的群组记录" exception. So that branch is essentially dead code—it can't actually save members.
>
> 3. **Potential duplicate saves**: When a user joins, `saveMember` might be called multiple times from different code paths. So both webhook calls trigger `saveMember` safely due to the upsert logic, but only `new_chat_members` sends welcome messages, which seems intentional. The `chat_member` handler correctly calls `saveGroup` for verification. I'm noticing the `ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE` uses the deprecated `VALUES()` function that could cause issues on MySQL 8.0.20+—should use column aliases instead. Also, when `saveMember` fails in `new_chat_members` because the group isn't found, it just logs silently rather than surfacing the error. Now I'm checking what happens in the `chat_member` flow when the status changes to something other than "member".
>
> When a user is restricted during verification, the `chat_member` update with `new_status = 'restricted'` won't match the `'member'` check, so `saveMember` doesn't get called. Then when verification completes and status becomes `'member'`, the `old_status` is `'restricted'`, making `$was_already_in = true`, which again skips the `saveMember` call. The user only gets saved when they send their first message. This looks like a real gap—verified users aren't immediately persisted upon verification completion.
>
> Looking at the actual issues in the code, I'm seeing a few key problems: the `VALUES()` function is deprecated in newer MySQL versions, there's a dead code path when the group lookup fails, and the `chat_member` handler doesn't properly track when members leave or get kicked. Let me trace through the left/kicked status changes more carefully to understand the full impact.

## 现有逻辑存在以下问题

### Bug 1（严重）— 超级群成员离开/被踢，状态永不更新

`chat_member` 处理器（第 181 行）只处理 `new_status === 'member'`：

```191:207:d:\work\chris\niuniu.5088.buzz\bot\webhook.php

            $was_already_in = in_array($old_status, ['member', 'administrator', 'creator', 'restricted'], true);
            if (!$was_already_in) {
                saveGroup($db, $chat);
                $from_user = $cm['from'] ?? null;
                $inviter = null;
                if ($from_user && empty($from_user['is_bot']) && isset($from_user['id'], $new_user['id']) && (int) $from_user['id'] !== (int) $new_user['id']) {
                    $inviter = $from_user;
                }
                if (handleBlacklistOnJoin($bot, $db, $chat_id, $new_user, $inviter)) {
                    error_log("chat_member: blacklisted user {$new_user['id']} handled in chat $chat_id");

```

当 Telegram 发来 `new_status = 'left'` 或 `'kicked'` 的 `chat_member` 更新时，**整个 if 块直接跳过，然后 exit**。对于 2000 人的超级群，`left_chat_member` 消息事件（第 663 行）根本不会触发（Telegram 只对小型旧式群组发送），**导致离开/被踢的成员在数据库里永远是 `member` 状态**。

---

### Bug 2（中等）— `VALUES()` 语法在 MySQL 8.0.20+ 已废弃

```819:826:d:\work\chris\niuniu.5088.buzz\bot\webhook.php
            ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE 
                username = ?, 
                first_name = ?, 
                last_name = ?,

                invited_by_username = COALESCE(VALUES(invited_by_username), invited_by_username),
                updated_at = NOW()
```

`VALUES()` 函数在 MySQL 8.0.20 起已废弃，会产生警告，未来版本会报错。

---

### Bug 3（中等）— `left_chat_member` 缺少 `exit`，导致双重处理

```662:674:d:\work\chris\niuniu.5088.buzz\bot\webhook.php

    $message = $update['message'];
    $chat_id = $message['chat']['id'];
    $user_id = $update['message']['left_chat_member']['id'];

`left_chat_member` 事件到来时：

## 🤖 Assistant #60 (Agent)

_2026-04-22 08:47:47Z_

现在我有足够信息了。给你分析最省力的改动方案：

---

## 可行方案：最小改动实现批量踢不活跃成员

### 核心依据

`group_members.updated_at` 字段天然就是**最后活跃时间**：  
每次用户发消息 → `saveMember()` → `ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE updated_at = NOW()`

所以直接用这个字段筛不活跃成员即可，**不需要加新字段**。

---

### 方案：只改 2 个文件

**改动 1：`api/members.php`** 新增一个 `kick_inactive` action（约 40 行）

```php
case 'kick_inactive':
    $group_id  = $data['group_id']  ?? 0;
    $days      = (int)($data['days'] ?? 30);  // 多少天未发言视为不活跃

    if (!$group_id || $days < 1) {
        jsonResponse(['success' => false, 'message' => '参数错误'], 400);
    }

    // 查出该群不活跃的普通成员（排除管理员/创建者/机器人）
    $stmt = $db->prepare("
        SELECT gm.user_id, g.chat_id
        FROM group_members gm
        JOIN groups g ON gm.group_id = g.id
        WHERE gm.group_id = ?
          AND gm.status = 'member'
          AND gm.is_bot = 0
          AND gm.updated_at < NOW() - INTERVAL ? DAY
    ");
    $stmt->execute([$group_id, $days]);
    $inactiveMembers = $stmt->fetchAll();

    $kicked = 0; $failed = 0;
    foreach ($inactiveMembers as $m) {
        try {
            // ban 后立即 unban = 踢出但不永久封禁
            $bot->banChatMember($m['chat_id'], $m['user_id'], time() + 31);
            sleep(0);  // 避免频率限制可调为 sleep(1)
            $bot->unbanChatMember($m['chat_id'], $m['user_id']);

            $db->prepare("UPDATE group_members SET status='kicked' WHERE group_id=? AND user_id=?")
               ->execute([$group_id, $m['user_id']]);
            $kicked++;
        } catch (Exception $e) {
            $failed++;
        }
    }
    jsonResponse(['success' => true, 'kicked' => $kicked, 'failed' => $failed,
                  'total' => count($inactiveMembers)]);
    break;
```

**改动 2：`members.php`** 在页面上加一个小表单（约 20 行 HTML/JS）

```html
<!-- 放在群组筛选框旁边 -->
<div style="margin: 10px 0">
  <input type="number" id="inactive_days" value="30" min="1" style="width:80px"> 天未发言
  <button onclick="kickInactive()">批量踢不活跃</button>
  <span id="kick_result"></span>
</div>

<script>
function kickInactive() {
    const days = document.getElementById('inactive_days').value;
    const group_id = <?= (int)$group_id ?>;
    if (!group_id) { alert('请先选择群组'); return; }
    if (!confirm(`确认踢出 ${days} 天内未发言的成员？`)) return;

    fetch('api/members.php', {
        method: 'POST',
        headers: {'Content-Type': 'application/json'},
        body: JSON.stringify({ action: 'kick_inactive', group_id, days })
    })
    .then(r => r.json())
    .then(d => {
        document.getElementById('kick_result').textContent =
            `完成：踢出 ${d.kicked} 人，失败 ${d.failed} 人（共匹配 ${d.total} 人）`;
    });
}
</script>
```

---

### 注意事项

| 问题 | 说明 |
|------|------|
| **潜水用户误踢** | `updated_at` 只记录发过消息的时间，从不发言但真实在群里的老成员也会被踢 |
| **管理员保护** | 查询已加 `status = 'member'`，排除了 `administrator`/`creator` |
| **Telegram 频率限制** | 踢人太快会被限流，人数多时建议 `sleep(1)` 每踢一个人等 1 秒 |
| **`banChatMember` + 立即 `unbanChatMember`** | 这是正确的"踢出不封禁"做法；`until_date = time()+31` 是因为 Telegram 要求至少 30 秒 |
| **Bot 必须是管理员** | Bot 需要有"踢出成员"权限 |

这个方案**只改 2 个文件，不动数据库结构**，和现有代码风格完全一致，改动量极小。
